title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NABARD Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NABARD Capital India:
NABARD Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD Capital India!
